## Overview

Give a high-level description of the documentation changes. Link to any relevant issue.

## What was changed

- Briefly describe what documentation was added, updated, or removed.

## Why

- Explain why this change is needed (e.g. missing docs, outdated content, new feature).

## Verification

- Describe how you checked that the documentation is accurate and renders correctly (e.g. checked links, previewed Markdown).

## Author checklist

I confirm that these changes:

- [ ] Follow the process described in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md#Pull_Request_Process).
- [ ] Are limited to documentation (no source code changes).
- [ ] Are accurate and up to date.
- [ ] Are clearly written and understandable by the intended audience.
- [ ] Don't introduce broken links or formatting issues.

## Reviewer checklist

I confirm that:

- [ ] The documentation is accurate.
- [ ] The writing is clear and consistent with the rest of the documentation.
- [ ] Links and references work correctly.
